name: kanboard
tagline: A lean kanban project management platform with automations and plugins
description: Kanboard is a lean project management tool focused on visualizing work. It offers swimlanes, automations, subtasks and plugins, with a self hosted web interface designed for teams adopting kanban methodologies.

features.title: Kanban Project Boards
features.description: Organize projects using customizable kanban boards

features.title: Task Management
features.description: Create, assign, and track tasks across project stages

features.title: User and Role Management
features.description: Manage users with role-based access per project

features.title: Notifications
features.description: Receive updates on task changes and deadlines

features.title: Plugin System
features.description: Extend functionality using community and custom plugins
